description: This pipeline annotates an OME image with metadata extracted from the OME metadata and then prettifies/formats the input XML data. The main steps involve annotating the image with OME metadata and prettifying the XML.

e49cfc5b-6a22-4a8a-9401-92983549b0ac.name: ome-annotate-with-metadata
e49cfc5b-6a22-4a8a-9401-92983549b0ac.description: Annotates an OME image with metadata extracted from the OME metadata
